posts.title: Welcome to Marker News
posts.summary: Updates, tips and announcements now land right here in the app.
posts.body:
# Welcome to Marker News

This is the new home for everything happening around Marker. Whenever there is
something worth your time, an update, a new feature walkthrough or a tip that
saves you hours on set, it lands here.

No noise, no spam. If the icon lights up, it is worth a look.
